name: Barbara Bush's Favorite Cookie Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt onto waxed paper.
2. In a large bowl, beat butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, egg with an electric mixer until fluffy, about 3 minutes. Gradually beat in hot water and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture until blended and smooth. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Drop dough by well-rounded spoonfuls onto a large greased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.
